title: cephalanthera rubra
intro: Cephalanthera rubra, also known as the red helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Cephalanthera rubra has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cephalanthera rubra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
